title: orchis papilionacea var. nivea
intro: Orchis papilionacea var. nivea, also known as the White Helleborine, is a rare and endangered orchid species found in Europe, characterized by its white flowers and greenish-yellow labellum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of White Helleborine include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of White Helleborine are typically made by drying the plant's roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
